name: Using *#*#4636#*#* to set preferred networks - XDA Forums
snippet: I've since been working with Google support. Their recommendation was to use *#*#4636#*#* to access the preferred network settings. How To Guide - Set Preferred Network Mode through Hidden Menu Network 4G/3G setting and preferred network type in *#*#4636 More results from xdaforums.com

name: Restore preferred network option in Settings menu - Google Help
snippet: Open the Phone app and dial *#*#4636#*#*. Tap Phone information. Note the line under Set Preferred Network Type, 5G is enabled if it starts with NR.
